name: Topgolf Swing Suite at iPlay America
about: The Topgolf Swing Suite at iPlay America is a premium indoor golf and entertainment venue featuring five unique bays equipped with game simulators. It offers a luxury suite experience with comfortable lounge seating, HDTVs, and full food and beverage service. The venue provides a variety of virtual golf games like TopContender, TopPressure, and TopChallenge, alongside non-golf options like Baseball Pitching and Zombie Dodgeball, making it suitable for both golfers and non-golfers. The facility operates under a per-bay-hour pricing model and requires a minimum one-hour rental, with a maximum of two hours per booking. It is designed for casual play, group celebrations, and corporate events, with an upscale lounge atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of virtual golf games and non-golf activities
Luxury suite experience with comfortable lounge seating and TVs
Full food and beverage service available onsite
Ideal for both serious practice and casual play
Convenient for group events and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full food service available; no outside food permitted except for cakes (with cutting fee)

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own golf bags; however, during peak hours (Friday – Sunday), only 2 additional bags per bay may be accommodated.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food and beverage are permitted into any area of the facility, including the Topgolf Swing Suite. Cakes are allowed, but a cake cutting fee per person will apply.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole game take?
faq.answer: You must rent the bay for at least 1 hour, with a maximum of 2 hours per reservation. Extensions may be possible based on availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Topgolf Swing Suite offers kids' party packages and is part of iPlay America, a family-friendly amusement venue with various attractions suitable for children.
